title: US judge will not rubber-stamp Elon Musk settlement with SEC
summary: A federal judge is withholding approval of the SEC's $1.5 million settlement with Elon Musk over his delayed Twitter stock disclosure. Judge Sparkle Sooknanan requires more information on the settlement's fairness and the process of its negotiation before proceeding.

title: Schools reach out to Canvas hackers as breach hits US classrooms
